advice.summary: You completed an easy run of 5 km, which is a good step towards rebuilding your running routine. Maintain consistency as you prepare for the Rome Half Marathon.
advice.focus: Prioritize easy aerobic runs to build endurance without overexerting yourself.
advice.nextSession: Plan for another easy run of 6-8 km in the next few days to continue building your base.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during runs; ensure it stays within a comfortable range to avoid fatigue.
